# Mohamed Gamal Shoaib - Portfolio

A portfolio website for Mohamed Gamal Shoaib, a Frontend Developer focused on React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

## Core Information
- Name: Mohamed Gamal Shoaib
- Role: Frontend Developer
- Location: Cairo, Egypt
- Expertise: Web engineering, UI/UX, Motion design, System Design.

## Main Sections
- [Projects](https://www.mohamedgshoaib.me/projects): Full-stack developer with experience in Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, and Supabase.
- [Blog](https://www.mohamedgshoaib.me/blog): Technical articles about React patterns, accessibility, and modern frontend architecture.

## Key Projects
- Devloop: Agency website with RTL-ready i18n and performance optimizations.
- Rootsly Notes: Learning tracker with Supabase and analytics.
- Mind Cave: High-performance bookmark manager with Chrome extension and real-time sync.

## Contact
- GitHub: [mohamed-g-shoaib](https://github.com/mohamed-g-shoaib)
- LinkedIn: [Mohamed Gamal Shoaib](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamed-g-shoaib/)
